title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Imamganj
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Imamganj constituency.

title: Flood protection works in Imamganj inspected by state cabinet delegation
snippet_text: With local embankments requiring urgent reinforcements, the local flood relief work has become a major talking point in Imamganj.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Imamganj
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Imamganj assembly segment.
